content:
A: well, if it will make you feel any better, I googled what could get me high at cvs and I found out that there are a bunch of things, legal things.

M: you ever smoke that legal weed? Its not a nice high, its dirty.

A: That is probably why it is still legal. Well there is this stuff, I think its some nose spray shit, and apparently you can crack it open, and there’s this little cotton tube filled with a chemical that is structurally similar to methamphetimean. Crystal meth. Now, you can be cracky and just swallow the cotton tube, and hope it doesn’t get caught in your digestive tract, or you can put it in an acidic solution and remove the chemical that gets you high.

M: why aren’t we at CVS?

A: This is a drug imma be doing by myself. Don’t need anyone to see this new low.

M: I trust that you will let me know when you wanna hit rock bottom

A: You would not believe how committed I am to hitting rock bottom when I put my mind to it.

——————————————————————
context: From document: Web Sitcom Ideas — chunk 5 (chunk 5/798)
